message:
chore: remove unused UI constants and extract hex colors to Tailwind config (#10274)

Remove 5 unused exported constants from lib/constants/ui.ts:
- CHART_TOOLTIP_BORDER_RADIUS (inlined into CHART_TOOLTIP_CONTENT_STYLE)
- CHART_LEGEND_WRAPPER_STYLE
- CHART_LEGEND_WRAPPER_STYLE_SM
- CHART_BODY_FONT_SIZE_SM
- DEV_BAR_HEIGHT_PX

Extract hardcoded arbitrary Tailwind hex colors into tailwind.config.js:
- linkedin/linkedin-dark (#0A66C2/#004182) for LinkedIn share buttons
- terminal (#0d0d0d) for console/shell backgrounds
- near-black (#0a0a0a) for auth callback background

Lower arbitrary-tw-color ratchet from 19 to 8.

Fixes #10271

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

files.patch:
@@ -75,6 +75,14 @@ export default {
          * Usage: text-status-success, bg-status-error, border-status-warning
          * Note: opacity modifiers (e.g., /20) are not supported with var() values.
          */
+        /** LinkedIn brand blue (#0A66C2) — used for LinkedIn share buttons */
+        linkedin: {
+          DEFAULT: '#0A66C2',
+          dark: '#004182',
+        },
+        /** Near-black backgrounds for terminal/console UIs */
+        terminal: '#0d0d0d',
+        'near-black': '#0a0a0a',
         status: {
           success: "var(--color-success)",
           warning: "var(--color-warning)",
